sn38.8:1.1: "Friend Sāriputta, it is said, ‘taint, taint.’ What now is a taint?"
sn38.8:1.2: "There are, friend, these three taints: the taint of sensuality, the taint of existence, the taint of ignorance. These are the three taints."
sn38.8:1.3: "But, friend, is there a path, is there a way for the abandonment of these three taints?"
sn38.8:2.2: "There is a path, friend, there is a way … this Noble Eightfold Path … ."
